title: bupleurum brachiatum
intro: Bupleurum brachiatum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or thunder god vine, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum brachiatum include relief from fever, colds, and flu, as well as support for the immune system and treatment of liver and gallbladder issues. Bupleurum brachiatum is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
